text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I make my way into the cafeteria,<n>where I notice
a small crowd huddled<n>around a table scattered
with coins.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Go all in, I dare ya. Let's raise the<n>stakes and
make things more excitin'.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Eek! Run away!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch, what a shame. And after I went<n>to all this
trouble to set this up.
choice_data_list: Don't tell me you were gambling...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hah, not exactly. Just a lil'<n>make-believe using
chocolate coins as<n>chips.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Casual games over candy aren't<n>against the
rules now, are they?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know what ya thought. ...Here,<n>pull up a
seat.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna make it up to me, humor<n>me with a
round of poker. Five-card<n>draw.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With her gaze fiercely fixed upon me,<n>I agree to a
match with Nakayama<n>Festa, and so the game
begins.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Shuffle.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, terrible poker face ya got there. I<n>take it
you've got a good starting<n>hand.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But does it top mine? Here, lemme<n>give ya a
sneak peek.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, Nakayama Festa starts<n>revealing her
cards without a shred of<n>hesitation!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Look here. I've got a three, four, five,<n>and a six.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If my last card's a seven, that's a<n>straight. Not
too shabby. What're you<n>workin' with over
there?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I look down at my three of a kind. If<n>she's telling
the truth, she has a<n>better hand than I do.
choice_data_list: I don't like my odds... I better fold.
She has to be bluffing... I'm all in!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch, what a killjoy. So you're the<n>type to lie in
wait for the right<n>opportunity, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But I have to admit, you did make the<n>right call
this round.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She reveals her last card as she says<n>this—a
seven of hearts. I nearly fell for<n>her ruse!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ya dodged a bullet there. But are ya<n>really
content just playin' it safe?<n>Play like you mean
it. I want<n>somethin' high-stakes and down to<n>
the wire.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Puttin' it all on the line and goin' all in,<n>eh? Little
better than throwin' yourself<n>to the wolves...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Still, true victory can only be obtained<n>by those
willing to seize it right outta<n>the maw of death.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, she shows me her last<n>card—a four
of clubs. My gamble paid<n>off!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Guess this was worthwhile,<n>after all. To
think I'd find someone<n>here cut from the same
cloth as me.
